name: SOC-Automation
description: Automated SOC pipeline — Wazuh → VirusTotal → TheHive → Email
author: Chand Nisar — SMALTER 2026

nodes.name: Wazuh Webhook Trigger
nodes.description: Receives Wazuh alerts via HTTP POST webhook

nodes.name: Parse Alert
nodes.description: Extracts key fields from Wazuh JSON alert

nodes.name: VirusTotal IOC Lookup
nodes.description: Submits file hash to VirusTotal API v3 for reputation scoring

nodes.name: TheHive Create Case
nodes.description: Creates an incident case in TheHive with all enriched data

case_template.title: [Wazuh] {{rule.description}} on {{agent.name}}
case_template.description: Rule {{rule.id}} level {{rule.level}} triggered on {{agent.name}} ({{agent.ip}}). VirusTotal score included.

nodes.name: Send Email Notification
nodes.description: Sends email alert to SOC analyst

config.subject: Wazuh Alert — {{rule.description}} on {{agent.name}}
